raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the look focus primarily on writing polish, or on argument-level soundness and evidentiary support?","rationale":{"R1.2":"A general request to look at a research paragraph can centrally imply checking whether the claims and reasoning cohere.","R1.6":"Because the artifact is presented as a paragraph, sentence- and paragraph-level readability is a central expected responsibility.","RX.1":"The projection should disclose ambiguity in the underspecified delegation.","RX.2":"The projection should avoid inflating the implied task beyond what the short request supports.","RX.3":"The projection must stay within responsibility classification rather than reviewing or editing the artifact.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling harmful downstream misuse of unsupported scientific claims.","RX.5":"The projection should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the artifact type."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the look focus primarily on writing polish, or on argument-level soundness and evidentiary support?

rationale.R1.2: A general request to look at a research paragraph can centrally imply checking whether the claims and reasoning cohere.
rationale.R1.6: Because the artifact is presented as a paragraph, sentence- and paragraph-level readability is a central expected responsibility.
rationale.RX.1: The projection should disclose ambiguity in the underspecified delegation.
rationale.RX.2: The projection should avoid inflating the implied task beyond what the short request supports.
rationale.RX.3: The projection must stay within responsibility classification rather than reviewing or editing the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling harmful downstream misuse of unsupported scientific claims.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the artifact type.
